text: There is no order of difficulty in miracles. One is not "harder" or "bigger" than another. They are all the same. All expressions of love are maximal.

archive.text: Miracles are natural. When they do not occur something has gone wrong.
The miracle is a learning device that lessens the need for time.
Prayer is the medium of miracles. It is a means of communication of the created with the Creator.
Miracles are thoughts. Thoughts can represent the lower or bodily level of experience, or the higher or spiritual level of experience.
A miracle is a service. It is the maximal service you can render to another.
